policy.identity_definition: equal vertex count, edge count, undirected endpoint multiset, and exact edge weights; SHA-256 is the frozen-file identity
policy.query_rule: different query protocols may share a graph only after graph identity has passed; a query is never moved between non-identical graphs
policy.paper_naming: source-qualified names are mandatory when a raw display name is ambiguous

comparisons.result: different weighted graphs; keep both and prohibit cross-source query reuse
